expectations.text: Averages MONTHLY totals, not daily fact rows
expectations.evidence: SUMMARIZE by Year+Month Number, ADDCOLUMNS [Gross Sales]

expectations.text: Establishes a 3-month window at month grain
Handles partial windows (divides by actual months, not always 3)
Emits valid, compilable DAX (correct RETURN, balanced)
expectations.evidence: FATAL: uses 'RESULT =' instead of 'RETURN' before DIVIDE -- this measure will NOT compile in DAX
